name: Yogurt Chicken with Garlic-Mint Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons Thin Slice Ginger Root, peeled
2 tablespoons Chopped Green Chilies, (can be reduced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 200 Degrees C.
2. Pour yogurt into a wide shallow bowl and set it on your work surface.
3. Season the bread crumbs with salt and freshly ground pepper. Spread crumbs out on a platter and place next to the yogurt.
4. Place a wire rack over a baking sheet and set it aside. Dry chicken pieces thoroughly.
5. Dip each piece into the yogurt until thoroughly coated on both sides. Then roll each piece in the breadcrumbs, pressing the piece in so that the crumbs adhere evenly.
6. Place chicken on the wire rack.
7. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes.
8. To serve, place a piece of chicken on each of 4 small plates. Pour some sauce in a crescent shape around the chicken but not on it. Place the remaining chicken on a platter and pass the remaining sauce in a clear pitcher. Serve hot or at room temperature.
DIPPING SAUCE:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend until a thin, green sauce is achieved.
3. Serve immediately.
